items.title: Caught Between Ayam Gepuk And Weight Loss Injections: A Public Health Warning For Malaysia’s Youth — Nor Zehan Ahmad, Dr Noor Hanita Zaini & Dr Noor Hasliza Che Seman
items.summary: The generation caught between ayam gepuk and weight-loss injections should not be blamed. It is a generation growing up in a complex health environment. The real issue is not that young people enjoy food, but that insecurity has become a market. The post Caught Between Ayam Gepuk And Weight Loss Injections: A Public Health Warning For Malaysia’s Youth — Nor Zehan Ahmad, Dr Noor Hanita Zaini & Dr Noor Hasliza Che Seman appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: SG Lim Concludes 2,200Km Run For Gold, Raises Over RM700,000 For Children With Cancer
items.summary: Run for Gold draws inspiration from the Gold Ribbon, the universal symbol for childhood cancer awareness, representing the preciousness of children and the courage, strength, and resilience of young patients and their families. items.title: Response To MOH’s Explanation On Subspecialty Training Rejections — Specialist
items.summary: MOH's non-explanation on the subspecialty training rejections points fingers in all directions. Some subspecialties were forced to accept zero candidates despite endorsements, while others saw a reduction of more than 80% intake compared to previous years. The post Response To MOH’s Explanation On Subspecialty Training Rejections — Specialist appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Despite US-Iran Peace Deal, Agriculture Ministry Expects Market Disruptions For Two Years
items.summary: Despite the US-Iran peace deal, KPKM sec-gen Isham Ishak expects prices of fuel, fertiliser, and animal feed to stay high for two years, but says Malaysia has enough fertiliser supply till end 2026 and food for next year. El Niño may hit veggie production. The post Despite US-Iran Peace Deal, Agriculture Ministry Expects Market Disruptions For Two Years appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Animal Production, Veterinary Industry Conferences To Merge Under Gavis 2026
items.summary: Ten annual conferences by associations in the animal production and veterinary industries, traditionally held separately, will instead be combined under the inaugural Gavis 2026 summit from July 21-23 in Putrajaya to save costs and time for participants. The post Animal Production, Veterinary Industry Conferences To Merge Under Gavis 2026 appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Is Male Infertility The Missing Piece? When Men Need To Be Part Of The Fertility Conversation
items.summary: When a couple struggles to conceive, it is rarely a one-sided story. Yet for decades, the fertility spotlight has shone almost exclusively on women. It is time to change that conversation – and science is firmly on our side. The post Is Male Infertility The Missing Piece? When Men Need To Be Part Of The Fertility Conversation appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Three Generations, Two Battles: How Dengue Stole What Mattered Most
items.summary: Dengue affects all age groups, from young children to the elderly, and infection can happen more than once because there are four different strains of the virus. The post Three Generations, Two Battles: How Dengue Stole What Mattered Most appeared first on CodeBlue .
